description: Shanghai has a vibrant returnee community with many resources for those seeking faith connections.
descriptionZh: 上海有活跃的海归社区，为寻找信仰连接的人提供了丰富的资源。

resources.name: Shanghai Returnee Fellowship
resources.description: Weekly gatherings for returnees, bilingual discussions on faith and life.
resources.descriptionZh: 海归每周聚会，中英双语讨论信仰与生活。

resources.name: Pudong International Community
resources.description: English-speaking community welcoming returnees. Sunday gatherings and weekday small groups.
resources.descriptionZh: 欢迎海归的英语社区。周日聚会和平日小组。

resources.name: Faith & Business Network Shanghai
resources.description: Monthly breakfast meetings for professionals exploring the intersection of faith and work.
resources.descriptionZh: 每月早餐会，为探索信仰与工作交汇的专业人士而设。

description: Beijing's faith community is strong and well-connected, with particular strength in university areas.
descriptionZh: 北京的信仰社区强大且联系紧密，在大学区尤其活跃。

resources.name: Haidian Returnee Group
resources.description: Small group near Zhongguancun area, popular with tech returnees.
resources.descriptionZh: 中关村附近的小组，科技行业海归很多。

resources.name: Beijing International Fellowship
resources.description: Large community with multiple language groups and a strong returnee ministry.
resources.descriptionZh: 大型社区，有多语言小组和成熟的海归事工。

description: Shenzhen's young, entrepreneurial culture creates a unique environment for faith and work integration.
descriptionZh: 深圳年轻的创业文化为信仰与工作的融合创造了独特的环境。

resources.name: Nanshan Returnee Circle
resources.description: Casual meetups for returnees in the Nanshan tech hub area.
resources.descriptionZh: 南山科技中心区的海归轻松聚会。

resources.name: Shenzhen Young Professionals
resources.description: Faith-oriented networking for young professionals in tech and finance.
resources.descriptionZh: 面向科技和金融行业年轻专业人士的信仰导向社交。
